parameters.query: SELECT l.id AS launch_id, l.user_id, l.launch_name, l.product_name, l.launch_type, l.competitor_names, l.target_launch_date, l.actual_launch_date, l.readiness_score, l.tags FROM launch.launches l WHERE l.phase = 'retrospective' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM launch.playbooks pb WHERE pb.launch_id = l.id);
SELECT b.brief_type, b.title, b.brief_date, b.signal_count, b.days_to_launch FROM launch.briefs b WHERE b.launch_id = '{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid ORDER BY b.brief_date ASC;
SELECT rc.check_date, rc.score FROM launch.readiness_checks rc WHERE rc.launch_id = '{{ $('Get Retrospective Launches').item.json.launch_id }}'::uuid ORDER BY rc.check_date ASC;

SELECT dr.week_number, dr.momentum_status, dr.messaging_drift_score, dr.competitor_response_count FROM launch.decay_reports dr WHERE dr.launch_id = '{{ $('Get Retrospective Launches').item.json.launch_id }}'::uuid ORDER BY dr.week_number ASC;

INSERT INTO launch.playbooks (launch_id, title, content_json, content_md, total_briefs_generated, total_signals_consumed, peak_readiness_score, final_momentum_status) VALUES ('{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.playbook_title }}', '{{ $json.playbook_json }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.playbook_md.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.total_briefs }}, {{ $json.total_signals }}, {{ $json.peak_readiness }}, '{{ $json.final_momentum }}') ON CONFLICT (launch_id) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, content_json = EXCLUDED.content_json, content_md = EXCLUDED.content_md, total_briefs_generated = EXCLUDED.total_briefs_generated, total_signals_consumed = EXCLUDED.total_signals_consumed, peak_readiness_score = EXCLUDED.peak_readiness_score, final_momentum_status = EXCLUDED.final_momentum_status;

INSERT INTO launch.briefs (launch_id, brief_type, brief_date, title, content_md, signal_count, days_to_launch) VALUES ('{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid, 'playbook', CURRENT_DATE, '{{ $json.playbook_title }}', '{{ $json.playbook_md.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.total_signals }}, -30);
UPDATE launch.launches SET phase = 'completed', updated_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid;
